# BeaconWeb
> Business automation agency specializing in lead-to-appointment systems for service businesses.

BeaconWeb builds automated systems that turn leads into booked appointments — without the business owner lifting a finger. The flagship offering is the Lead-to-Appointment System, built in GoHighLevel.

## Owner
- Tristan Trigg
- Email: tristantrigg@beaconweb.co
- Phone: (541) 291-7030
- Location: La Quinta, CA — Coachella Valley

## Core Offering: Lead-to-Appointment System
A complete automation built in GoHighLevel with 8 components:
1. Lead Capture — all channels, one inbox
2. Instant SMS Response — under 60 seconds, every time
3. AI Qualification — filters serious leads automatically
4. Follow-Up Sequences — 7-day automated touches
5. Missed Call Text-Back — every missed call gets an instant text
6. Calendar Booking — leads book themselves
7. Pipeline Tracking — real-time visibility on every lead
8. Review Requests — automated after every completed job

## Target Clients
Service businesses where missed leads = missed revenue: HVAC, plumbing, roofing, landscaping, med spas, dental practices, real estate agents, auto detailers, home services, solar, law firms, insurance agents.

## Key Claim
"Every lead gets a response in under a minute. Every missed call gets followed up. Every job gets a review request. Automatically."

## Pricing
Three tiers: Core System / Full System / Full System + Reviews. Setup fee + monthly management. No long-term contracts.

## Technology
- GoHighLevel (CRM, automation, SMS, calendar, pipeline)
- HTML/CSS/JS (custom-coded website)
- Netlify (hosting)
- GitHub (version control)
